eas_text: A civil authority has issued A FIRE WARNING for the following counties or areas: Jefferson, OR; at 7:29 PM on JUN 4, 2026 Effective until 8:29 PM. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text: Wildfire Alert from Frontier Regional 911. Level 3 - GO NOW - Evacuate immediately from South of Dry Creek Trail to Mile marker 101 on Highway 26, and West of Tommie Street, and North of George Street on the Warm Springs Reservation
